prompt: Create a vertical bar chart using SVG showing monthly website traffic: Jan=12400, Feb=15600, Mar=18200, Apr=14800, May=21000, Jun=19500. Include labeled X-axis (months), Y-axis with gridlines, a title 'Monthly Website Traffic 2024', value labels above each bar. Blue gradient bars. No external libraries.

test_cases.name: Values shown
Prompt value 12400 on page
Prompt value 15600 on page
Mobile layout preserves prompt-grounded content instead of only a viewport tag [tc_12]

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const chart=document.querySelector('svg,canvas');const marks=document.querySelectorAll('svg rect, svg circle, svg path, svg line, svg polyline, svg polygon, table tr').length;const labels=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg text,text,h1,h2,h3,figcaption,th')].filter(visible).length;return chart!==null&&marks>=4&&labels>=2;})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["monthly website traffic 2024", "12,400", "21,000", "12400,", "15600,", "18200,"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const patternsOk=patternHits>=1;const root=document.documentElement;const widthOk=(root.scrollWidth||document.body.scrollWidth)<=430;return widthOk&&surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&patternsOk;})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

Bars extend from left to right, with city names on the left side and values at the end of the bars. Gradient green bars. Title: Population of Major Cities in China (2024). No external libraries.

数据显示

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const broken=/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]| undefined | nan /i.test(text);const media=[...document.querySelectorAll('canvas,svg,img,video')].some(visible);const surface=[...document.querySelectorAll('main,section,article,div,table,ul,ol,canvas,svg,img,video')].some(el=>{if(!visible(el))return false;const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width*r.height>=1200;});return !broken&&(media||text.length>=20||surface);})()

prompt: Create a grouped bar chart using SVG comparing Q1-Q4 revenue for two products. Product A: Q1=45K, Q2=52K, Q3=48K, Q4=61K. Product B: Q1=38K, Q2=41K, Q3=55K, Q4=49K. Bars side-by-side per quarter, different colors (blue/orange) with legend. Hover effect: bar highlights and shows tooltip with exact value. Animated bars growing from bottom on load. Y-axis with dollar scale, gridlines. Title and subtitle.

test_cases.name: 8 bars
Legend binds Product A and Product B to the grouped revenue series instead of a generic chart shell

steps.expression: (()=>{const text=(document.body.innerText||'');const ok=/Product A/i.test(text)&&/Product B/i.test(text)&&/Q1/.test(text)&&/Q4/.test(text);const legend=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg text, text, span, div, li')].filter(el=>/Product A|Product B/i.test(el.textContent||'')).length>=2;return ok&&legend;})()

test_cases.name: Quarter labels Q1-Q4 stay coupled to a grouped eight-bar structure

steps.expression: (()=>{const labels=['Q1','Q2','Q3','Q4'].every(q=>(document.body.innerText||'').includes(q));const rects=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg rect')].filter(el=>{const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width>4&&r.height>8;});return labels&&rects.length>=8;})()

test_cases.name: Bar-load animation changes visible bar heights during initial settle instead of rendering a static final frame

steps.expression: (()=>{const rects=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg rect,rect')].filter(el=>{const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width>4&&r.height>8;}); window.__r29_bar_anim_before=rects.map(el=>Math.round(el.getBoundingClientRect().height)).join('|'); return rects.length>=8;})()

(()=>{const rects=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg rect,rect')].filter(el=>{const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width>4&&r.height>8;}); const after=rects.map(el=>Math.round(el.getBoundingClientRect().height)).join('|'); return rects.length>=8 && after!==window.__r29_bar_anim_before;})()

test_cases.name: Chart axis shows labels from prompt (Q1/Q4/...)
Hover tooltip stays tied to the hovered bar state

steps.expression: (()=>{window.__bar_t_before=(document.body.innerText||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const bars=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg rect, rect')].filter(el=>{const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width>4&&r.height>8;});const el=bars[bars.length-1];if(!el)return false;const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();el.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mouseover',{bubbles:true,clientX:r.left+2,clientY:r.top+2}));el.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mousemove',{bubbles:true,clientX:r.left+3,clientY:r.top+3}));return true;})()

prompt: Build a stacked bar chart with SVG showing employee distribution by department and level. Departments: Engineering, Design, Marketing, Sales, HR. Levels: Junior (blue), Mid (teal), Senior (purple). Data: Eng=20/15/8, Design=8/6/3, Marketing=10/7/4, Sales=15/8/5, HR=5/3/2. Total label on top of each stack. Interactive: click a legend item to toggle that level's visibility. Responsive width.

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=="none"&&s.visibility!=="hidden"&&parseFloat(s.opacity||"1")>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};function norm(s){return (s||"").toString().toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g," ");}const html=norm(document.documentElement.innerHTML);const body=norm(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||"");const compact=html.replace(/[^a-z0-9.]+/g,"");const pairs=[["mon","18"],["tue","22"],["wed","20"],["thu","25"],["fri","23"],["sat","19"],["sun","21"]];function nearby(day,value){const i=html.indexOf(day);if(i<0)return false;return html.slice(Math.max(0,i-180),i+240).includes(value);}const labelsOk=pairs.every(p=>body.includes(p[0])||html.includes(">"+p[0])||html.includes("="+p[0]));const valuesOk=pairs.every(p=>body.includes(p[1])||html.includes(p[1]));const pairOk=pairs.every(p=>compact.includes(p[0]+p[1])||compact.includes(p[0]+"temp"+p[1])||compact.includes(p[0]+"temperature"+p[1])||nearby(p[0],p[1]));const svg=document.querySelector("svg");const points=[...document.querySelectorAll("svg circle, svg ellipse")].filter(visible).length;const line=document.querySelectorAll("svg path, svg polyline").length>0;return !!svg&&line&&points>=7&&labelsOk&&valuesOk&&pairOk;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: Create an area chart with SVG showing CPU usage over 24 hours. Data points every hour (0-23h): 15,12,8,5,4,3,6,25,65,78,82,75,68,72,80,85,78,62,45,35,28,22,18,16. Fill area under the curve with gradient (green<50%, yellow 50-80%, red>80%). Horizontal threshold lines at 50% and 80%. Time labels every 4 hours. Animated: line draws progressively. Hover shows exact value. Title: Server CPU Usage (24h).

test_cases.name: Area path
CPU chart animates over exact 0-23h domain with 50/80 thresholds

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=e=>{if(!e)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(e),r=e.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0};const norm=s=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const labels=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg text,text')].filter(visible).map(e=>norm(e.textContent)).filter(Boolean);const hasTick=h=>labels.some(t=>new RegExp('^0?'+h+'\\s*(h|:00)?$','i').test(t));const required=[0,4,8,12,16,20].every(hasTick);const forbidden=labels.some(t=>/^(23\s*h?|23:00|24\s*h?|24:00)$/i.test(t));const threshold50=labels.some(t=>/^50\s*%?$/.test(t)||/^50%/.test(t));const threshold80=labels.some(t=>/^80\s*%?$/.test(t)||/^80%/.test(t));const paths=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg path')].filter(visible).length;return required&&!forbidden&&threshold50&&threshold80&&paths>=2;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const svg=document.querySelector('svg');if(!svg)return false;function norm(s){return String(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();}const labels=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg text,text')].map(el=>norm(el.textContent)).filter(Boolean);const labelText=labels.join(' ');const pageText=norm((document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'')+' '+labelText);const needed=['0','4','8','12','16','20'];const hasTick=h=>labels.some(t=>new RegExp('^0?'+h+'\\s*(h|:00)?$','i').test(t));const exactTicks=needed.every(hasTick);const badExtra=labels.some(t=>/^(23|24)\s*(h|:00)?$/i.test(t));const thresholdOk=/(^|\D)50\s*%(\D|$)/.test(pageText)&&/(^|\D)80\s*%(\D|$)/.test(pageText);const geometryOk=document.querySelectorAll('svg path,svg polyline').length>=1;return geometryOk&&thresholdOk&&exactTicks&&!badExtra;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: Create an interactive real-time line chart, single HTML file, SVG rendering. Simulate real-time data: add a new random data point every second (range 20-80), display at most the most recent 60 points (1-minute window), old data slides out from the left. Dual Y-axes: left axis for values, right axis for moving average (5 points). Mouse hover displays crosshair and precise values. Zoom: mouse wheel zooms in/out time window (30s-120s). Pause/Resume button. Statistics panel: current value/maximum/minimum/average/standard deviation. Dark theme, neon green line. Export current data as CSV.

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: Build an interactive donut chart with SVG showing project time allocation: Development 35%, Testing 20%, Design 15%, Meetings 15%, Documentation 10%, Admin 5%. Hover a slice to expand it outward and show a tooltip with category name, percentage, and hours (based on 40h week). Click a slice to toggle a detail panel below showing sub-breakdowns. Animated entrance: slices grow from center. Legend toggles: click to hide/show a category. Center text updates to show hovered category.

test_cases.name: Donut chart binds all six categories to exact percentage and hour values

steps.expression: (()=>{const text=(document.body.innerText||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ');const cats=['Development','Testing','Design','Meetings','Documentation','Admin'].every(x=>new RegExp(x,'i').test(text));const pct=['35','20','15','10','5'].filter(v=>new RegExp(v+'\\s*%').test(text)).length>=5;const hrs=['14','8','6','4','2'].filter(v=>new RegExp(v+'\\s*h').test(text)).length>=5;return cats&&pct&&hrs;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: Create a nested donut chart (sunburst) with SVG. Outer ring: Revenue by region (Americas 45%, Europe 30%, Asia 20%, Other 5%). Inner ring: Revenue by product within each region (Product A/B/C split). Americas: A=20%, B=15%, C=10%. Europe: A=12%, B=10%, C=8%. Asia: A=8%, B=7%, C=5%. Color families per region (blues for Americas, greens for Europe, reds for Asia). Hover shows breadcrumb trail (Region > Product > %). Click inner ring to zoom into that region only.

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const chart=document.querySelector('svg,canvas');const marks=document.querySelectorAll('svg rect, svg circle, svg path, svg line, svg polyline, svg polygon, table tr').length;const labels=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg text,text,h1,h2,h3,figcaption,th')].filter(visible).length;return chart!==null&&marks>=4&&labels>=2;})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["45%,", "30%,", "20%,", "15%,", "10%.", "12%,"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "svg path", "gte": 12}, {"selector": "svg, canvas", "gte": 1}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(patternHits>=1)&&(structureHits>=1);})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: Create an editable pie chart generator, single HTML file, SVG rendering. User input: dynamically add/delete data items (name + value), minimum 2 items, maximum 8 items. Real-time pie chart updates. Features: toggle pie/donut chart mode, toggle 2D/3D perspective (CSS transform to simulate 3D tilt), custom color scheme (each segment can select color), show/hide percentage labels, show/hide legend, animation toggle. Export as SVG file (download). Rotation animation: slow auto-rotation (pausable). Data validation: automatically calculate percentages, values cannot be negative. 3 preset color schemes available.

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{window.__r27_scatter_labels_before=(document.body.innerText||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();return true;})()

(()=>{const points=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg circle,circle')].filter(el=>{const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width>2&&r.height>2;});const p=points[Math.min(3,points.length-1)];if(!p)return false;const r=p.getBoundingClientRect();p.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mouseover',{bubbles:true,clientX:r.left+2,clientY:r.top+2}));return true;})()

(()=>{const text=(document.body.innerText||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const linked=[...document.querySelectorAll('.active,.highlight,.selected,[data-active=true],[data-highlight=true]')].length>=2;return (text!==window.__r27_scatter_labels_before && /height|weight|age/i.test(text)) || linked;})()

(()=>{const el=[...document.querySelectorAll('text,button,li,div,span')].find(node=>/male|female/i.test(node.innerText||node.textContent||''));if(!el)return false;el.click();return true;})()

(()=>{const vis=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg circle,circle')].filter(el=>{const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();const s=getComputedStyle(el);return r.width>2&&r.height>2&&s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0.1;});const colors=[...new Set(vis.map(el=>getComputedStyle(el).fill+'|'+getComputedStyle(el).stroke))];return vis.length>0 && colors.length>=1 && vis.length<window.__r27_scatter_colors_before.length;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: Create an interactive scatter plot with zoom and pan using SVG. 100 data points (pre-generated random: X 0-1000, Y 0-1000, size 5-30, color by 4 categories). Features: mouse wheel zoom (2x-20x), click-drag to pan, rubber-band selection (drag to select rectangle, selected points highlight and stats shown). Lasso selection mode toggle. Tooltip on hover. Filter panel: checkboxes per category. Axis rescale on zoom. Reset zoom button. Minimap in corner showing full dataset with viewport rectangle. Point count display updates with filters/selection.

test_cases.name: Main scatter plot binds 100 points with 4 categories and 5-30 size range

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const svgs=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg')].filter(visible).map(svg=>({svg,r:svg.getBoundingClientRect()})).filter(o=>o.r.width>180&&o.r.height>180).sort((a,b)=>b.r.width*b.r.height-a.r.width*a.r.height);if(!svgs.length)return false;const main=svgs[0].svg;const pts=[...main.querySelectorAll('circle,.data-point')].filter(el=>{if(!visible(el))return false;const b=el.getBoundingClientRect();return b.width>=4&&b.height>=4;});const vals=pts.map(el=>{const b=el.getBoundingClientRect();const cs=getComputedStyle(el);return {size:parseFloat(el.getAttribute('r')||'0')||Math.max(b.width,b.height)/2,fill:(el.getAttribute('fill')||cs.fill||'').trim()};}).filter(v=>Number.isFinite(v.size)&&v.size>0&&v.fill);const counts={};for(const v of vals){counts[v.fill]=(counts[v.fill]||0)+1;}const categoryBuckets=Object.values(counts).filter(n=>n>=8).length;const sizes=vals.map(v=>v.size);const min=Math.min(...sizes),max=Math.max(...sizes);return pts.length>=90&&categoryBuckets>=4&&min>=4.5&&min<=7&&max>=25&&max<=32&&(max-min)>=18;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const svgs=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg')].filter(visible).map(svg=>({svg,r:svg.getBoundingClientRect()})).filter(o=>o.r.width>180&&o.r.height>180).sort((a,b)=>b.r.width*b.r.height-a.r.width*a.r.height);if(!svgs.length)return false;const main=svgs[0].svg;const axisSnap=()=>[...main.querySelectorAll('text')].filter(visible).map(t=>[(t.textContent||'').trim(),Math.round(+t.getAttribute('x')||t.getBoundingClientRect().left),Math.round(+t.getAttribute('y')||t.getBoundingClientRect().top)].join(':')).join('|');const miniSnap=()=>{const rects=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg rect,#minimapViewport,#miniViewport,#minimap-viewport,#viewport-rect')].filter(visible).map(r=>{const b=r.getBoundingClientRect();return {el:r,area:b.width*b.height,x:Math.round(b.left),y:Math.round(b.top),w:Math.round(b.width),h:Math.round(b.height),cls:r.getAttribute('class')||'',id:r.id||''};}).filter(o=>o.area>20);const candidates=rects.filter(o=>/mini|view|viewport/i.test(o.cls+' '+o.id)).concat(rects.filter(o=>o.area<12000));return candidates.map(o=>[o.x,o.y,o.w,o.h,o.cls,o.id].join(':')).join('|');};const r=main.getBoundingClientRect();window.__scatter_zoom_snap={axis:axisSnap(),mini:miniSnap(),target:main};main.dispatchEvent(new WheelEvent('wheel',{bubbles:true,cancelable:true,deltaY:-900,clientX:r.left+r.width*.55,clientY:r.top+r.height*.45}));return true;})()

prompt: Build a scatter plot with regression analysis using SVG. 30 data points showing house price (Y, $K) vs square footage (X). Data includes outliers. Features: linear regression line with equation (y=mx+b) and R-squared displayed. Toggle polynomial regression (degree 2,3). Residual plot below (shows deviation from regression line). Confidence interval band (95%) around regression line. Click to add/remove data points interactively. Outlier detection: points beyond 2 standard deviations highlighted red. Statistics panel: mean, median, std dev for both variables. Export data as CSV.

test_cases.name: Regression scatter binds house-price data, diagnostics, and export controls instead of only rendering an SVG

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&Number(s.opacity||1)>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();if(/\bNaN\b|\bundefined\b|\[object Object\]|ReferenceError|TypeError|SyntaxError/i.test(text))return false;const svg=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg')].some(visible);const pts=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg circle,circle')].filter(visible).filter(c=>{const r=c.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width>=3&&r.height>=3;}).length;const domain=/house|home|price|\$\s*k|\$k/i.test(text)&&/square|sq\.?\s*ft|footage/i.test(text);const equation=/\by\s*=\s*[-+]?\d*\.?\d+(?:\s*\*?\s*x|x)\s*[+-]\s*\d*\.?\d+/i.test(text);const r2=/(r\s*(?:[- ]?squared|²|\^2|2)?|r-squared|r2)\s*(?:score)?\s*[:=]?\s*(?:0?\.\d+|1(?:\.0+)?)/i.test(text);const diagnostics=[/residual/i,/confidence|95%/i,/outlier/i,/median|mean|std/i,/csv|export/i].filter(r=>r.test(text)).length;return svg&&pts>=25&&domain&&equation&&r2&&diagnostics>=4;})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: Heatmap table renders with colored cells

prompt: Create a sortable data table in a single HTML file. Display economic data for 10 countries: Country, GDP (trillion USD), Population (hundred million), GDP per capita (USD), GDP growth rate (%), HDI index. Data is built-in. Click column headers to sort (toggle ascending/descending with sort arrow indicators). Search box to filter country names. GDP growth rates highlighted in green/red for positive/negative values. GDP per capita cells with gradient background colors (darker for higher values). Fixed table header with scrollable content. Zebra-striped rows.

test_cases.name: Economic table keeps required GDP, population, per-capita, growth, and HDI columns with 10 country rows

steps.expression: (()=>{const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ');const headers=['country','gdp','population','per capita','growth','hdi'].every(x=>text.includes(x));const rows=document.querySelectorAll('tbody tr, table tr, [role=row]').length>=10;const nums=(text.match(/\d+(?:\.\d+)?/g)||[]).length>=25;return headers&&rows&&nums;})()

prompt: Create a correlation matrix heatmap with SVG. 6 variables: height, weight, age, income, education_years, health_score. Pre-computed correlation values (-1 to +1). Blue-white-red color scale (blue=-1, white=0, red=+1). Values displayed in each cell (2 decimal places). Hover shows detailed info. Diagonal cells show variable names. Click a cell to show the corresponding scatter plot below (using the two variables). Dendogram on the left showing hierarchical clustering of variables. Toggle: show/hide values, change color scheme (blue-red / purple-orange / grayscale). Export as image.

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: Build a calendar heatmap for the year 2024 using SVG. 365 cells arranged in GitHub contribution graph style (weeks as columns, days as rows). Data: simulated daily step counts (0-20000). Color scale: light yellow (<3000) to dark red (>15000). Month separators and labels. Hover: date, step count, ranking. Click a day to see hourly breakdown bar chart below. Stats panel: daily average, best day, worst day, streaks (consecutive days above 10000). Filter: click month name to zoom into that month. Animated entrance (cells fade in by month). Export annual summary.

(()=>{const t=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const hasSurface=t.length>30||document.querySelector('canvas,svg,table,form,main,section,article,details,[role=dialog],progress')!==null;const broken=/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(t);return hasSurface&&!broken;})()

test_cases.name: JS validation checks prompt-grounded structure instead of a malformed or vacuous selector

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const chart=document.querySelector('svg,canvas');const marks=document.querySelectorAll('svg rect, svg circle, svg path, svg line, svg polyline, svg polygon, table tr').length;const labels=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg text,text,h1,h2,h3,figcaption,th')].filter(visible).length;return chart!==null&&marks>=4&&labels>=2;})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["0-20000", "15000", "10000", "2024", "3000", "365"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "svg rect", "gte": 300}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(patternHits>=1)&&(structureHits>=1);})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const broken=/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]| undefined | nan /i.test(text);const media=[...document.querySelectorAll('canvas,svg,img,video')].some(visible);const surface=[...document.querySelectorAll('main,section,article,div,table,ul,ol,canvas,svg,img,video')].some(el=>{if(!visible(el))return false;const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width*r.height>=1200;});return !broken&&(media||text.length>=20||surface);})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: Dataviz page renders chart marks with a labeled surface

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const svg=document.querySelector('svg'); const canvas=document.querySelector('canvas');const marks=document.querySelectorAll('svg rect, svg circle, svg path, svg line, svg polyline, svg polygon').length;const labels=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg text, text, figcaption, h1, h2, h3')].filter(visible).length;return (svg!==null || canvas!==null) && marks>=4 && labels>=2;})()

prompt: Create a sales analytics dashboard in one HTML file with multiple SVG charts. Top row: 4 KPI cards (Revenue $1.2M, Orders 8432, Avg Order $142, Return Rate 3.2%). Middle: bar chart (monthly revenue, 6 months) on left, line chart (daily orders, 30 days) on right. Bottom: pie chart (sales by category: Electronics 35%, Clothing 25%, Home 20%, Sports 12%, Other 8%) and a top products table (5 rows). All charts hand-coded SVG, no libraries. Responsive CSS grid layout.

prompt: Build a COVID-style epidemiological dashboard in one HTML file. Multiple SVG charts with interactive date range selector. Charts: (1) Daily new cases area chart (90 days simulated data, 7-day moving average overlay), (2) Cumulative cases line chart, (3) Cases by age group horizontal bar chart (0-17, 18-34, 35-54, 55-74, 75+), (4) Recovery vs Active vs Deaths stacked area chart, (5) Geographic table (10 regions with sparklines). Date range slider filters all charts simultaneously. Summary cards: total cases, active, recovered, deaths, CFR%. Toggle: linear/logarithmic Y-axis. Dark theme with red accent.

test_cases.name: Charts render on dashboard

prompt: Create an e-commerce operation data dashboard in a single HTML file, optimized for 16:9 full-screen display. Layout: Large header at the top with real-time clock. Left panel: Real-time scrolling order list (add one simulated order every 3 seconds), Today's GMV (number flip animation). Center: China map heatmap (using simplified SVG map with 10 provinces, color intensity indicates order volume). Right panel: Category sales ranking (horizontal bar chart, 8 categories), User source pie chart (4 channels). Bottom: 24-hour order volume line chart (real-time updates). Deep blue tech style with glowing border effects. Number rolling animations. All data is simulated with no external API/library dependencies.

test_cases.name: Bottom 24-hour order volume chart renders hourly SVG marks and updates the current hour from new orders

steps.expression: (()=>{const html=document.documentElement.outerHTML||'';const text=(document.body.innerText||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').toLowerCase();const svg=document.querySelector('svg#line-chart,svg.line-chart,svg[id*=line],svg[class*=line]');const path=[...document.querySelectorAll('#chart-path,#chart-line,path.chart-path,path[id*=line],path[id*=chart],svg.line-chart path')].find(p=>((p.getAttribute('d')||'').match(/[MLC]/g)||[]).length>=12);const area=[...document.querySelectorAll('#chart-area,path.chart-area,path[id*=area],path[class*=area]')].find(p=>((p.getAttribute('d')||'').match(/[MLC]/g)||[]).length>=12);const points=[...document.querySelectorAll('#chart-points circle,circle.chart-point,circle[data-hour][data-value],svg.line-chart circle')];const labels=[...document.querySelectorAll('text,.x-axis-labels span,.x-axis-labels div,#x-axis-labels *')].map(e=>(e.textContent||'').trim()).filter(t=>/^\d{1,2}:00$/.test(t));const objectHourly=new RegExp('hourly\\w*\\s*=\\s*\\[|let\\s+hourlydata\\s*=|const\\s+hourlydata\\s*=|hour\\s*:\\s*hour\\.gethours\\s*\\(|data-hour','i').test(html);const currentHourUpdate=new RegExp('currenthour[\\s\\S]{0,260}(findindex|\\[currenthour\\]|gethours)[\\s\\S]{0,300}(value\\s*\\+=|hourlyorders\\s*\\[[^\\]]+\\]\\+\\+|renderlinechart\\s*\\()','i').test(html);return /24\s*[- ]?hour|24\s*h|24小时/.test(text)&&!!svg&&!!path&&!!area&&points.length>=20&&labels.length>=6&&objectHourly&¤tHourUpdate;})()

(()=>{const html=(document.documentElement.outerHTML||'').toLowerCase();const path=document.querySelector('#chart-path,[id*=line] path,.chart-path,path[class*=line]');const pathAfter=path?path.getAttribute('d')||'':'';const points=[...document.querySelectorAll('#chart-points circle,.chart-point,circle[data-value],svg circle')];const hourLabels=(document.body.innerText.match(/\b(?:[01]?\d|2[0-3]):00\b/g)||[]);const dataSource=/hourlydata|hourlyorders|24/.test(html);const enough=points.length>=20||hourLabels.length>=8||dataSource;const textAfter=(document.body.innerText||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ');const changed=(window.__hd_line_before_path&&pathAfter&&pathAfter!==window.__hd_line_before_path)||textAfter!==window.__hd_line_before_text||points.length!==window.__hd_line_before_points;return enough&&!!(path||points.length>=20)&&changed;})()

steps.expression: (async()=>{const txt=()=>document.body.innerText.replace(/\s+/g," ");const orders=()=>[...document.querySelectorAll("li,tr,.order,[class*=order]")].filter(e=>/\d|¥|￥|order|订单/i.test(e.innerText||e.textContent||"")).length;const nums=()=>txt().match(/(?:¥|￥)?\d[\d,.]*/g)?.join("|")||"";const chart=()=>[...document.querySelectorAll("svg path,svg polyline,svg rect,[class*=bar]")].map(e=>e.getAttribute("d")||e.getAttribute("points")||e.getAttribute("height")||String(Math.round(e.getBoundingClientRect().height))).join("|");const o0=orders(),n0=nums(),c0=chart();await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,6500));return orders()>=o0+2&&nums()!==n0&&chart()!==c0;})()

prompt: Create a financial portfolio analytics dashboard in one HTML file. Multiple interactive SVG visualizations: (1) Portfolio value line chart with benchmark comparison (S&P 500), dual Y-axis, (2) Asset allocation treemap (stocks, bonds, real estate, crypto, cash — each subdivided), (3) Risk-return scatter plot (each holding as a bubble, size=allocation %), (4) Dividend income bar chart (monthly, 12 months), (5) Performance attribution waterfall chart (starting value → gains/losses by category → ending value). Timeframe selector (1M/3M/6M/1Y/ALL) updates all charts. Holdings table with sparklines. Print-friendly mode button. Dark theme with gold accent.

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&Number(s.opacity||1)>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const raw=document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'';if(/\bNaN\b|\bundefined\b|\[object Object\]|ReferenceError|TypeError|SyntaxError/i.test(raw))return false;const nodes=[...document.querySelectorAll('body,section,article,li,div,svg,text,[aria-label],[title],[alt],[data-target],[data-percent],[style]')];const textOf=el=>((el.innerText||el.textContent||'')+' '+['aria-label','title','alt','data-target','data-value','data-percent','style','class','id'].map(a=>el.getAttribute&&el.getAttribute(a)||'').join(' ')).replace(/\s+/g,' ').toLowerCase();const joined=nodes.map(textOf).join(' ');const stats=[/5\.3\s*(?:b|billion)?|5,?300\s*(?:m|million)?/,/6\s*(?:h|hr|hours?)\s*58|6[:：]\s*58|6\s*hours?\s*58|58\s*(?:m|min|minutes?)/,/4\.9\s*(?:b|billion)?|4,?900\s*(?:m|million)?/,/59\s*%|data-percent=.?.?59|width\s*:\s*59%|--[^:]{0,30}:\s*59/,/82\s*%|data-percent=.?.?82|width\s*:\s*82%|--[^:]{0,30}:\s*82/];const allStats=stats.every(r=>r.test(joined));let statModules=0;for(const re of stats){if(nodes.some(el=>visible(el)&&re.test(textOf(el))))statModules++;}const percentVisuals=[...document.querySelectorAll('progress,meter,svg circle,svg rect,[class*=progress i],[class*=bar i],[class*=ring i],[class*=circle i],[style*=width],[style*=--percent],[data-percent]')].filter(visible).length;const icons=(raw.match(/[\u{1F300}-\u{1FAFF}\u{2600}-\u{27BF}]/gu)||[]).length+[...document.querySelectorAll('[class*=icon i],img,svg')].filter(visible).length;return allStats&&statModules>=5&&percentVisuals>=2&&icons>=1;})()

prompt: Build a timeline infographic about the history of the internet using HTML/CSS/SVG. Vertical timeline with alternating left-right content cards. 8 milestones: 1969 ARPANET, 1971 Email, 1983 TCP/IP, 1989 WWW, 1993 Mosaic Browser, 1998 Google, 2004 Facebook, 2007 iPhone. Each card: year (large), title, short description (1-2 sentences), small icon. Connecting line with dots at each milestone. Scroll-triggered fade-in animation for each card. Color gradient from vintage (sepia) at top to modern (blue) at bottom.

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: Visual infographic renders

prompt: Create a comparison infographic: Electric vs Gas Cars using HTML/CSS/SVG. Two-column layout with a center dividing line. Compare 6 metrics side by side: Purchase Price ($35K vs $28K), Annual Fuel Cost ($500 vs $1800), Maintenance ($300 vs $700), CO2 Emissions (0 vs 4.6 tons), Range (300mi vs 400mi), Charging/Refuel Time (8h vs 5min). Each metric shown as opposing horizontal bars growing from center. Winner highlighted with a checkmark. Summary: total cost of ownership over 5 years as a large comparison number. Clean modern design with green (electric) and gray (gas) color coding.

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const chart=document.querySelector('svg,canvas');const marks=document.querySelectorAll('svg rect, svg circle, svg path, svg line, svg polyline, svg polygon, table tr').length;const labels=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg text,text,h1,h2,h3,figcaption,th')].filter(visible).length;return chart!==null&&marks>=4&&labels>=2;})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["5 year", "1800", "co2", "500", "4.6", "300"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const patternsOk=patternHits>=1;const root=document.documentElement;const widthOk=(root.scrollWidth||document.body.scrollWidth)<=430;return widthOk&&surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&patternsOk;})()

prompt: Create a complete annual report infographic, single HTML file, long scrollable page. Sections: (1) Company Overview: logo placeholder, founding year, employee count (animated counter), office locations map (simplified SVG). (2) Financial Highlights: annual revenue (large numbers + YoY growth arrow), profit margin gauge, quarterly trend line chart. (3) Product Matrix: 4 product cards, each with user count and rating. (4) User Growth: area chart showing 12-month user growth, milestone markers (breaking 1M/5M, etc.). (5) Team: donut chart showing department headcount distribution. (6) Outlook: 3 target progress bars. Smooth scroll navigation (top anchor links). Print version button (hide animations/simplified layout). Dark business style, gradient colors.

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()
